title: Jake Paul Reflects on Whole Career
summary: This interview features Jesse Michels talking with Jake Paul about his career trajectory from Disney Channel star to professional boxer and venture capitalist. The conversation covers Jake's decision to leave traditional entertainment, his embrace of authenticity and villain persona in boxing, his venture fund Anti-Fund, and his commentary on fighter pay issues in combat sports.

key_claims.claim: Jake Paul was making approximately ten thousand dollars per episode on Disney Channel while working six days a week for 12 hours a day
Jake Paul did not get fired from Disney but rather it was a mutual separation
Running a boxing training camp is very expensive
UFC fighters are significantly underpaid compared to what they should earn
